name: ad-lib-saas
description: AD.LIB Studio — Deploy any ad format from the library via agentic video pipelines

scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: for pkg in packages/*/; do (cd "$pkg" && bun run build 2>/dev/null || true); done
scripts.build:apps: for app in apps/*/; do (cd "$app" && bun run build 2>/dev/null || true); done
